hooks.command: sh -c 'case "$TOOL_INPUT" in *schema.d.ts*) echo "STOP: src/Cvoya.Spring.Web/src/lib/api/schema.d.ts is generated by openapi-typescript. Run npm run generate-api (or /openapi-diff) instead of editing it." >&2; exit 2;; esac'

sh -c 'which notify-send >/dev/null 2>&1 && notify-send "Claude Code" "Task completed" || which osascript >/dev/null 2>&1 && osascript -e "display notification \"Task completed\" with title \"Claude Code\"" || true'
